# Commit message check
- [ ] My commit title(s) are specific enough to understand **what changed** and **where it changed**.
- [ ] I did **not** use vague titles like `update`, `fix`, `sync`, or `misc cleanup`.
- [ ] If this PR includes sync-related commits, the title uses clear CET-6 project wording.
- [ ] I checked `COMMIT_MESSAGE_GUIDELINES.md` if I was unsure.

# Risk / Notes
- Does this affect sync boundaries, reminders, or shared state files?
- Any reviewer context or follow-up notes?
